name: Spaghetti Sauce of Three Meats
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef, chicken, and pork pieces in hot fat with sliced onions and garlic.
2. Add strained tomatoes and tomato paste to the pot. Stir in basil, parsley, bay leaves, and garlic cloves.
3. Season to taste and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours until the meat is tender.
4. Add lemon juice to taste.
5. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions.
6. Heat Italian meatballs separately.
7. Remove the cooked meat from the sauce and slice it.
8. Combine the sliced meat, cooked spaghetti, and remaining sauce. Serve.
This recipe freezes well.
